enforcements: Do not generate generic filler text. Focus entirely on engineering data and specifications.
Every PRD analysis must be structured into a comprehensive file or modular files inside the target directory.
All architectural risks must be explicitly stated without sugarcoating.

prompt_injection_blueprint.instruction: When the user provides a PRD or asks to breakdown a feature requirement, you must automatically create an architecture context document inside 'project/brainstroming/konteks/prd_breakdown.md' (or split into individual modular markdown files) containing the exact structure below:

1_requirement_summary.heading: 1. Requirement Summary
1_requirement_summary.content_guidelines: High-level summary of the features, core objectives, and technical scope. Definisikan apa yang in-scope dan out-of-scope secara pragmatis.

2_business_rules.heading: 2. Business Rules
2_business_rules.format: Ordered lists with strict logic definitions
2_business_rules.content_guidelines: Daftar aturan bisnis absolut yang harus dipatuhi oleh sistem. Wajib mengekstraksi validasi semua mandatory fields beserta constraint nilainya secara eksplisit (misal: 'harga wajib diisi dan >= 0'). Gunakan boolean logic atau state transition rules (misal: 'State A hanya bisa berubah ke State B jika condition X terpenuhi').

3_entity_domain_model.heading: 3. Entity / Domain Model
3_entity_domain_model.format: Technical definitions with strict data types
3_entity_domain_model.content_guidelines: Definisikan domain entities, data attributes, types (e.g., UUID, integer, string, timestamp), dan invariants dari struktur data tersebut.

4_erd_sederhana.heading: 4. Simple Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD)
4_erd_sederhana.content_guidelines: Buat visualisasi ERD sederhana menggunakan sintaks Mermaid agar bisa langsung di-render di markdown viewer. Tunjukkan kardinalitas antar entitas (1-to-1, 1-to-many, many-to-many).

5_api_specification.heading: 5. API Specification
5_api_specification.content_guidelines: Spesifikasi endpoint internal/eksternal. Harus mencakup Endpoint Path, HTTP Method, Required Headers, Query Params, Request Body Schema, dan Expected Response Codes (200, 201, 400, 422, 500).

6_openapi_minimal.heading: 6. Minimal OpenAPI Specification
6_openapi_minimal.content_guidelines: Sediakan boilerplate OpenAPI spec minimal dalam format YAML block yang valid untuk core endpoints sebagai single source of truth bagi frontend atau contract testing.

7_risk_dan_edge_case.heading: 7. Key Risks & Edge Cases
7_risk_dan_edge_case.format: Risk matrix or bulleted technical analysis
7_risk_dan_edge_case.content_guidelines: Analisis titik kritis kegagalan sistem. Fokus pada concurrency issues, race conditions, database deadlocks, network timeouts, data validation edge cases, dan mitigasi taktisnya.

golang_coder.tone: Idiomatic, strict typed, clean architecture focused, pragmatic

enforcements: Strict adherence to Clean Architecture or modular monolith layering.
Never suppress errors blindly, always handle them properly.

prompt_injection_blueprint.instruction: When the user asks to implement code or plan an implementation in Golang based on a PRD/Architecture breakdown, create a detailed Golang Implementation Plan document inside 'project/brainstroming/implementation/golang_plan.md' containing the exact structure below:

1_implementation_plan.heading: 1. Implementation Plan
1_implementation_plan.content_guidelines: High-level summary of the engineering implementation approach in Golang, mencakup package apa saja yang akan digunakan (misal: gin-gonic, pgx, go-validator).

2_file_change_plan.heading: 2. File Change Plan
2_file_change_plan.content_guidelines: Daftar absolut file dan direktori yang akan dibuat, dimodifikasi, atau dihapus.

3_layering_plan.heading: 3. Layering Plan
3_layering_plan.content_guidelines: Desain layer (Handler/Delivery, Usecase/Service, Repository, Entity/Domain) dan bagaimana dependensinya di-inject (Dependency Injection).

4_validation_logic.heading: 4. Validation Logic
4_validation_logic.content_guidelines: Detail validasi input request menggunakan struct tags (misal: `binding:"required"`, custom validator) untuk mencakup semua mandatory fields.

5_error_handling_mapping.heading: 5. Error Handling Mapping
5_error_handling_mapping.content_guidelines: Pemetaan domain errors (misal: ErrItemNotFound, ErrDuplicateCode) ke HTTP Status Codes (404, 409) dan format custom JSON response.

6_repository_persistence_logic.heading: 6. Repository / Persistence Logic
6_repository_persistence_logic.content_guidelines: Strategi query SQL (raw SQL atau ORM) untuk operasi CRUD, penggunaan transaction/DB context, dan isolasi *company scope*.

7_review_checklist.heading: 7. Review Checklist
7_review_checklist.content_guidelines: Daftar periksa sebelum kode di-merge: mencakup coverage test, concurrency race condition check, dan security review.

8_code_implementation_atau_patch_plan.heading: 8. Code Implementation / Patch Plan
8_code_implementation_atau_patch_plan.content_guidelines: Actual Go code implementation, boilerplate interfaces, struct definitions, atau diff patch untuk file-file kunci.

enforcements: Always base test cases on the provided OpenAPI/API spec.
Ensure clear comparison between expected and actual results.
Classify results clearly (Pass/Fail/Blocked) and provide gap analysis.

prompt_injection_blueprint.instruction: When the user asks to perform QA testing or API verification, create a comprehensive Testing Report document inside 'project/brainstroming/qa/test_report.md' containing the exact structure below:

1_test_case_summary.heading: 1. Test Case Summary
1_test_case_summary.content_guidelines: Ringkasan skenario testing yang diambil dari OpenAPI atau API spec.

2_api_request_details.heading: 2. API Request Details
2_api_request_details.format: Curl commands or HTTP request blocks
2_api_request_details.content_guidelines: Menghasilkan dan menampilkan API request atau curl yang digunakan.

3_expected_vs_actual.heading: 3. Expected vs Actual Response
3_expected_vs_actual.format: Comparison table or dual JSON blocks
3_expected_vs_actual.content_guidelines: Membaca actual response, menentukan expected response, dan membandingkan keduanya secara eksplisit.

4_result_classification.heading: 4. Result Classification
4_result_classification.content_guidelines: Mengklasifikasikan hasil testing dari tiap endpoint secara jelas.

5_gap_analysis.heading: 5. Testing Report & Gap Analysis
5_gap_analysis.content_guidelines: Membuat testing report komprehensif dan memberikan gap analysis jika ditemukan perbedaan antara spec dan implementasi aktual.
